pre-commit.name: notes-api-smoke
pre-commit.description: Runs the notes-api-smoke skill: boots notes_api.py and asserts all 5 CRUD endpoints (+404 guard) return the correct HTTP status codes. Blocks the commit (exit 1) on any FAIL.
pre-commit.command:
set -uo pipefail
DIR="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/Poornima-Bootcamp/module-09"
PORT=18765
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:$PORT"
PASS=0; FAIL=0
echo "── notes-api-smoke (pre-commit) ──────────────────────"
lsof -ti :"$PORT" 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
( cd "$DIR" && uv run --with fastapi --with uvicorn uvicorn notes_api:app --port "$PORT" --log-level warning ) &
PID=$!; sleep 3
check() { local l="$1" e="$2"; shift 2; local a
  a=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$@")
  if [ "$a" = "$e" ]; then echo "PASS  $l"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
  else echo "FAIL  $l  (expected $e, got $a)"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); fi; }
ID=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE/notes" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"smoke","body":"test"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['id'])" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
check "POST /notes → 201"             201 -X POST "$BASE/notes" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"t","body":"b"}'
check "GET  /notes → 200"             200 "$BASE/notes"
check "GET  /notes/$ID → 200"         200 "$BASE/notes/$ID"
check "PATCH /notes/$ID → 200"        200 -X PATCH "$BASE/notes/$ID" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"updated"}'
check "GET  /notes/999 → 404"         404 "$BASE/notes/999"
check "DELETE /notes/$ID → 204"       204 -X DELETE "$BASE/notes/$ID"
kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$DIR/notes.db"
echo "──────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
echo "Results: $PASS/6 passed"
[ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ] && { echo "BLOCKED — fix the failing endpoints before committing."; exit 1; } || { echo "ALL PASS — commit allowed."; exit 0; }
